## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] No breaking changes (or labeled with `breaking`)
- [ ] Source `README.md` updated (if adding/changing resources)
- [ ] Root `README.md` updated (if adding a new source)
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` extras updated (if adding a new source)
- [ ] `uv run pytest -v` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] AI rules synced (`bash scripts/sync-ai-rules.sh`) if `.ai/` was edited
